long_description:
QA is testing CRC phase 3, where we support greater than 10 TB snapshot copy, to test that we need to edit the snapshot size to >10 TB.
Incident source: NA - Aaryan Raj
short_description: Edit the snapshot size for QA testing

current_status_next_steps:
From a jumpod in RIAS side.
1. edit the snapshot
kubectl edit snap r026-c46c7788-f305-4215-84c2-b631f2d976fc -n 9a9bcf0574b74eb6b1de49b236111f24

2. find  snapshotSize field in the status and change the value to 11126548987904 then Save

 -- runbook link --
